source: Source-trace inspection of localized .strings resources, app-source RTL-aware SF Symbol usage, and a validated multisurface-harness dry-run on 2026-05-18. No screenshot captures are committed under this directory.
gate_result_reason: Source-trace surfaced 2 high-confidence right-to-left HIG defects in Owlory source code (HIG-AR-001 chevron.right + HIG-AR-002 arrow.right.circle); these are deterministic SwiftUI behaviours that do not need screenshot confirmation to flag, only to measure visible impact. Source-trace also surfaced 1 adaptive-layout finding (HIG-AR-003 Career tab label width). No preserved screenshot evidence exists for any scoped surface.

signoff_baseline.scope: Permits HIG bucket-gate slices to run against current LLM-drafted text. Does NOT claim native review, fluent review, translation quality, or screenshot/device/TestFlight proof.

harness_plan.dry_run_status: planned (7 captures for ar; idb + idb_companion ready)

label_overrides_needed.today: Arabic today label 'اليوم' is not in the harness default catalog. --label-overrides JSON should set today.ar to include 'اليوم' before --capture.

harness_plan.actual_capture_status: not run in this slice. Capture is deferred to a separate follow-up screenshot-capture slice.

source_trace_arabic_text.notes: Tab labels other than Career fit typical iPhone tab-bar widths. Career 'المسيرة المهنية' (15 chars including space) is significantly longer than the English 'Career' (6 chars) and is the longest Career label across all 19 locales; see HIG-AR-003.

open_findings.summary: TodayView uses the explicit directional SF Symbol 'chevron.right' which does NOT auto-mirror under RTL layout direction. Under Arabic (RTL), the chevron should point leading-to-trailing (right-to-left), but 'chevron.right' always points right. Apple HIG requires direction-aware icons to mirror.
open_findings.confidence_basis: Deterministic SwiftUI rule: SF Symbols named .right / .left do not auto-mirror; SF Symbols named .forward / .backward do. This is a source-level defect, not a layout inference.
open_findings.proof_path_or_chat_observation: Source-level evidence only. Visible-impact screenshot under Arabic launch is the confirmation step.
remediation_options: Or apply '.flipsForRightToLeftLayoutDirection(true)' to the Image; the .forward form is preferred per Apple HIG.

open_findings.summary: WriteView uses the explicit directional SF Symbol 'arrow.right.circle' which does NOT auto-mirror under RTL layout direction. Under Arabic (RTL), the arrow should point leading-to-trailing (right-to-left). Apple HIG requires direction-aware action icons to mirror.
open_findings.confidence_basis: Deterministic SwiftUI rule: SF Symbols named .right / .left do not auto-mirror; SF Symbols named .forward / .backward do. This is a source-level defect, not a layout inference.
open_findings.proof_path_or_chat_observation: Source-level evidence only. Visible-impact screenshot under Arabic launch is the confirmation step.
remediation_options: Two call sites in WriteView; both should be updated together.

open_findings.summary: Arabic Career tab label 'المسيرة المهنية' (15 chars including space) is the longest Career label across all 19 supported locales (compare: en 'Career' = 6 chars; most other locales <= 9 chars). Tab-bar truncation likely on smaller iPhone widths and at larger Dynamic Type settings.
observed_evidence: Comparison across locales: en=6, de=8, fr=8, ja=4 (キャリア), zh-Hans=2 (事业), ar=15 chars.
remediation_options: Capture Arabic Career tab screenshots on iPhone SE / standard iPhone portrait and confirm whether the label truncates.
Shares fix shape with HIG-DE-002/FR-001/JA-001/NL-001/RU-001/TR-001/UK-001 from the other bucket gates; a single tab-bar UI-tweak slice should address all eight after screenshot confirmation.
Native reviewer could also propose a shorter Arabic Career form (e.g., 'مهنة' or 'مسيرة') if shorter terminology is acceptable in context.

missing_evidence_for_pass: Build Info screenshot with complete gate fields (version, build, commit short/full, branch, source-clean flags)
Today screenshot under Arabic with no visible app-owned English strings
All five root tabs under Arabic
Primary actions under Arabic (especially WriteView advance action — confirm HIG-AR-002 impact)
Dynamic Type pass (standard text size + Larger Accessibility Text)
Accessibility labels/hints/values for the reviewed surfaces under Arabic

RTL-only mirroring evidence: layout mirrored, alignment, navigation affordances, ordered controls, directional symbols not pointing the wrong way, digits inside numbers not reversed, non-direction-bearing artwork not flipped
not_claimed: screenshot-reviewed, device-verified, or testflight-verified for Arabic
RTL mirroring is proven correct on Owlory localized surfaces
downstream_recommendations: HIG-AR-001 and HIG-AR-002 are source-level defects that should be fixed regardless of screenshot capture. Queue a narrow Swift slice that swaps 'chevron.right' -> 'chevron.forward' in TodayView and the two 'arrow.right.circle' -> 'arrow.forward.circle' in WriteView. This is a small, targeted, RTL-correctness fix.

After the icon fix lands, run automation/smoke/capture_localized_surfaces.py --capture --locales ar --surfaces today root-tab-train root-tab-write root-tab-career root-tab-home build-info date-count-plural-today --label-overrides path/to/ar_label_overrides.json. The overrides file must set today.ar to include 'اليوم'.
After capture, confirm or deny HIG-AR-003 (Career tab truncation) and append findings + the all-locale HIG evidence matrix per_locale_state for ar.
If HIG-AR-003 is confirmed, the tab-bar UI-tweak slice should bundle Arabic alongside the seven other tab-truncation findings.
